title: SSWS governed workspace and folder targets (registry-only paths)
policy_note: Opening a workspace or folder is not npm start, deploy, or git. NAS paths are declaration-only until mounted and verified.

entries.name: Z-Sanctuary SSWS multi-root workspace
entries.notes: Primary SSWS workspace file; use doorway opener only — no auto-run of SSWS boot.

entries.name: Z-Sanctuary Universe repository folder
entries.notes: Folder-only entry when workspace file is not the target.

entries.name: Example HOLD (decision lane)
entries.notes: Illustrative HOLD; opener and apply must skip until status is lifted.

entries.name: Example RED blocked path (disabled by default)
entries.notes: Keep disabled for routine status runs; enable only for RED drill — opener must never open RED.

entries.name: Future NAS workspace (declaration only)
entries.notes: Keep disabled until Synology volume is mounted, path verified, then enable with AMK posture.
